reviews.comment:
Esta bien ubicada, el parador es pequeño, mal olor y lleno de moscas,  los baños estaban limpios y en condiciones. Pero le falta bastante. Una sola empleada atendiendo y haciendo todas las tareas.

It is well located, the hostel is small, smelly and full of flies, the bathrooms were clean and in good condition. But he is missing a lot. A single employee attending and doing everything.

(Translated by Google)
It's well located, but the hostel is small, smelly, and full of flies. The bathrooms were clean and in good condition. However, it's lacking in many ways. There's only one employee attending to everyone and doing all the tasks.
